emails.subject: Williston Basin PA
emails.body: Williston Basin PA I asked Fannette to deliver a PA from WBI that needs to be executed and returned by July 14. Can you please review and add the standard "management out" on our side. I briefly reviewed and noticed that WBI has a couple of unilateral "outs", but nothing for us. Please advise. Thanks Stephanie
